name: Mexican Sweet Potato Soup
method: Take a pan and heat the oil.
Put the onion in it and cook for 4-5 minutes.
Add stock cube in boiling water, and then add it to the pan.
Add sweet potatoes. Then bring it to boil. Simmer it while keeping it
covered for about 10 minutes. Use a blender to make it smooth.
Take out in a bowl. Sprinkle coriander leaves and bread rolls, and
